title: nigella ciliaris
intro: Nigella ciliaris, also known as Roman corndragon or horned poppy, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Nigella ciliaris include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its use as a natural remedy for respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Nigella ciliaris can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
